funFacts: Iguanodon was a large herbivore from the Early Cretaceous period, famous for its distinctive conical thumb spikes.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing blending pastel shades using high-resolution colored pencils.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about prehistoric animal anatomy while developing fine motor coordination.
